heading: Today
text: Occasional rain and showers from the Green Mountains west, and north of Rt. 2, spreading southeast in the afternoon.  Cooler.  Highs in the upper 40s to mid 50s north, in the 60s south.  Winds light from the south, becoming north 5 to 15 mph from the Adirondacks, Rt. 4, and White Mountains north.

heading: Tonight
text: Showers diminishing and ending west to east, last through NH into southeast VT.  Partial clearing after midnight,  Cooler.  Lows in the 30s to low 40s north, in the 40s south.  Winds northwest 5 to 10 mph, light in sheltered valleys.

heading: Thursday
text: Periods of morning clouds, giving way to sun, then mixing with afternoon clouds.  Highs in the 50s, closer to 60 south.  Winds becoming west to northwest near 10 mph, a few gusts to 20 mph over the higher terrain and NH.
